data.name: Hellfire Factory
data.detailed_description:
The pipelines of Hellfire Industries run deep -- all the way to the depths of hell. And deep below, the factory workers need your help. Orcs, monsters and demons alike rely on you to solve a murder case. But remember: You've given your very soul to the factory and these workers. They are in charge, so watch your step and be respectful. Or deal with the consequences. 

Hellfire Factory is a 3d gay bara point'n click adventure game about serving demons, men and monsters, gay sex, domination, degradation, bdsm and being submissive.

Note: The game is anything but vanilla, and sex scenes range from sucking dick to more extreme scenarios like being turned into a urinal at a truck stop. Proceed at your own risk.

Story

Goblin Bry is hired to investigate the deaths of demon workers at Hellfire Industries, a factory collaborating with the denizens of hell. Immortals don't usually die easily, and Bry finds himself thrown into a much bigger mystery than he could ever imagine. His very soul now belongs to the factory and its demonic workers and bosses. It'd be in his best interest to try and please or pleasure them as well as he can. Demons love toying with little mortal souls, after all.

Unsure if this is for you? Here's a small overview of what's to be found in the game:

  • sucking dick & swallowing cum

  • getting shrunk down in size and being dominated or played with

  • servicing sweaty feet and armpits

  • big & musky dudes

  • being spit on

  • being turned into an object and getting used and degraded (e.g. a fleshlight)

  • getting turned into small slimy things and being humiliated

  • merging with someone's dick or ass

  • being shoved into various bodily orifices

Features

  • Classic point'n click gameplay with items, puzzles and dialog options

  • 60 optional adult / sex / fetish scenes and game over scenarios

  • Two endings (both are always reachable)

  • Unlock new areas throughout the main campaign & fast-travel

  • Fast-forward function (hold space)

  • Affinity bars for your three bosses -- figure out how to please and pleasure them

  • Free-roaming camera in certain places

  • A simple quest log to keep tabs on things

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2 GHz / Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 970 or comparable
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 9000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 3 GHz / Quad Core
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1080 or comparable
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 9000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
